text: A person who gets something in his or her eye and you see that it is not embedded, you can:

options.text: A) Get them to rub their eye until the object is gone
B) Remove it with a match or toothpick
C) Remove it with a moist cotton-tipped applicator

explanation: If a foreign object is visible and not embedded in the eye, gently removing it with a moist cotton-tipped applicator is the safest method. Rubbing the eye or using sharp objects can cause further damage or embed the object deeper.
